meta.maintenanceInstruction: KEEP THE PLAN UP TO DATE. DEVIATIONS LOGGED WITHIN. REASSESS HOLISTICALLY AFTER ANY CHANGE.
meta.completionPolicy: 100% COMPLETION REQUIRED. NO ESTIMATES. NO PRIORITIES. REFINE CONTINUALLY.
meta.blueprintRefinement: After completing any task, re-read and fix stale descriptions.

globalAlerts.warning: INTEGRATION TESTS: Ollama at localhost:11434 with gpt-oss:20b-cloud. Real tests MUST run.
TOOLS: config.mk targets via mcp-server-make. Use 'make make-all-with-log'.
NAMING: 'orchestrator' RETIRED. Use claudemux / claude-mux / osm:claudemux.
CROSS-PLATFORM: macOS + Linux Docker + Windows moo. Zero tolerance.
RULE OF TWO: Two contiguous issue-free reviews of IDENTICAL diff before commit.
BUILD: make after EVERY change. Zero failures.
IMMEDIATE: Use Ollama meaningfully with tool calling. CRITICAL PATH.

mandatoryDirectives.contextManagement: One task at a time, in order.
mandatoryDirectives.subagentPolicy: Subagents for Rule of Two ONLY. Work subagents do NOT self-review.
mandatoryDirectives.runMakeAfterEveryChange: make make-all-with-log after EVERY code change.
mandatoryDirectives.commitPolicy: Commit in logical chunks after Rule of Two.

sequentialTasks.task: T300-T310: Ollama HTTP client + comprehensive tests
sequentialTasks.description: Done. types.go (ChatRequest/Response, Message, ToolCall, Tool, Model, ModelInfo, RunningModel, VersionResponse, OllamaError, BoolPtr), client.go (NewClient, DefaultClient, Chat, ChatStream+StreamReader, ListModels, ShowModel, ListRunning, Version, Health, IsHealthy, WithHTTPClient, WithTimeout), client_test.go (30 httptest-based tests, all passing with -race).

Done. tools.go (ToolDef, ToolHandler, ToolRegistry with Register/MustRegister/Get/Has/Names/Len/OllamaTools/Execute), tools_builtin.go (RegisterBuiltinTools: read_file, write_file, list_dir, exec, grep, git_diff, git_log — all with path traversal protection and output truncation).

Done. agent.go (AgentConfig, AgentResult, AgenticRunner, NewAgenticRunner, Run, RunWithMessages, FormatToolCallSummary — multi-turn: Chat→tool_calls→execute→tool results→repeat, MaxTurns limit, OnToolCall/OnToolResult/OnAssistantMessage callbacks). tools_agent_test.go (19 tests: registry CRUD, builtin tool execution, agent loop with mock server, max turns, validation).

sequentialTasks.task: T327-T331: osm:ollama JS module + register.go wiring

Wired into register.go. All deadcode resolved. Full make GREEN.
Done. -integration flag via TestMain. Health, Version, ListModels, ShowModel, BasicChat ('2+2'→'4'). All pass against 0.16.2.

Done. ChatStream + StreamReader.Next(). chunks≥2. Full content coherent. defer reader.Close().

Done. orchestrate-pr-split.js. Ollama suggests ordering+names+messages. Returns SplitPlan compatible with executeSplit. Fallback to createSplitPlan.
Done. 8 fallback tests: NoModule, NoModel, SuggestNoModule, ExtractJSON, OllamaWorkflowTree fallback, OllamaClassifyNode fallback. All pass.
Done. OllamaHTTPProvider (provider_ollama_http.go). Channel-based AgentHandle adapter. Wired into resolveProvider as 'ollama-http'. 13 tests.
Done. 7 fields in ClaudeMuxConfig: OllamaEndpoint/Model/Timeout/MaxTurns/SystemPrompt/ToolsEnabled/ToolsAllowlist. Parsing in parseClaudeMuxOption. Schema registration. Tests.
Done. ToolsEnabled (*bool, nil→true), ToolsAllowlist (comma-separated). ToolRegistry.Remove(). Allowlist filtering in Spawn(). Wire in resolveProvider(). Tests.
